author: gb9t
content:
Iter 68 — breadth-first Tier-2 wrappers (storage stacks):

- drivers/nvme/00-overview.md: NVMe full stack — host common (core/constants/fabrics/ioctl/sysfs/zns/pr/auth/hwmon/fault_inject/trace) + host transports (pci/tcp/rdma/fc/apple-gated) + host multipath (ANA + iopolicy) + nvmet target (core/admin-cmd/io-cmd-bdev/io-cmd-file/passthru/fabrics-cmd/discovery/configfs + tcp/rdma/fc/loop/pci-epf-gated transports + zns/pr/auth target side). 15 REQ-O / 12 AC-O / 5 mandatory TLA+ models / 3 Verus contracts / 29 Tier-3 children declared.
- drivers/scsi/00-overview.md: SCSI middle-layer + ULDs + transports — mid-layer (scsi/scsi_lib/scsi_scan/scsi_error EH-escalation/scsi_devinfo/scsi_dh/scsi_ioctl/scsi_sysfs/scsi_proc/scsi_bsg/scsi_netlink/scsi_pm/scsi_logging/scsi_trace/scsi_debugfs/scsi_common/scsi_sysctl/constants), ULDs (sd + sd_dif T10-PI + sd_zbc ZBC; sr; st; ch; sg), transport classes (sas/fc/iscsi/spi/srp), lib transports (libsas/libfc/libiscsi/libfcoe), v0 LLD-maintenance set listed (mpt3sas/megaraid_sas/lpfc/qla2xxx/smartpqi/hpsa/storvsc/vmw_pvscsi/virtio_scsi etc.) with compile-gated-off legacy ISA/Amiga/Atari list. 14 REQ-O / 12 AC-O / 5 mandatory TLA+ models / 3 Verus contracts / 33 Tier-3 children declared.

Total state: 174 .design docs, 39 Tier-2 wrappers (15 top-level + 24 sub-tier-2). Storage backbone (block + nvme + scsi) Tier-2-complete.

Knowledge pages: design-drivers-nvme-overview, design-drivers-scsi-overview.

Iter 69 plan: drivers/net/ethernet/00-overview.md (ethernet driver framework + per-vendor LLDs incl Intel igb/ixgbe/i40e/ice/idpf, Mellanox mlx4/mlx5, Broadcom bnxt, virtio-net) + drivers/usb/00-overview.md (USB host + gadget + storage + serial + hid+net stacks).
